title: Shadowfall - ALPHA
description: A dark horror fantasy modpack with a dash of magic and creatures from the depths
body:
# Shadowfall
> **Plunge into a world where darkness seeps into every corner, and magic is both a gift and a curse.**  
> Ancient ruins whisper forgotten secrets, eldritch horrors lurk in the shadows, and mighty dragons rule the skies.
> 
>  # **Reminder this pack is in Alpha, there will be lots of changes!**

![da logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc3706071119ff58bd7582567e63e6c59ca8f149_0.webp)
### ⚔️ Features:
- **Master the Arcane** - Harness the power of **Botania, Blood Magic, and Iron’s Spells 'n Spellbooks**.
- **A World of Darkness** - Survive in a medieval world enhanced with **YUNG's structures, Medieval Deco, and Medieval Paintings**.
- **A Challenge Awaits** - Face off against **Ice and Fire's legendary dragons** and other monstrous creatures.
- **Immersive Horror** - **Insanity Shader and Sound Physics** create a chilling, atmospheric experience.
- **Survive or Succumb** - Explore cursed dungeons, uncover forbidden knowledge, and wield magic to resist the creeping darkness.
- **Quality of Life** - Experience the new mobs and some quality of life features using [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- **Extra Textures!** - Enjoy the new look menu's and GUI's (still in the works cus alpha obviously)

---

For those who dare, **Shadowfall** blurs the line between nightmare and reality.  
Will you master the darkness, or will it consume you?

---
Want to help me improve this project? Join my Discord server! [https://discord.gg/FNucZGac4t](https://discord.gg/FNucZGac4t)
